description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine purge_opf_bus_indv_3, and is implemented by a call to purge_opf_bus_indv_3. Use this API to purge (re-initialize) OPF bus voltage magnitude data for an individual record in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_bus_indv(eibus)

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
